title: 贴纸芯片

evidence.canonical:
[ edit | edit source ]
 • Awarded from Temporal Archimedea with certain research points.
 • 28 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 6

• 37 Points (Elite): Pix Chip x 9

• Certain Peely Pix will reward an additional Pix Chip for completing a stage with the Pix equipped in exchange for an additional debuff, up to 3 extra Pix Chip s. Only 1 additional Pix Chip will be rewarded per stage; repeating a stage using a different Peely Pix will not give another Pix Chip.
 • It Sees You periodically spawns a hostile Antimatter Drop that will chase you throughout the selected mission.

• Old Pizza gives any damage received during the selected mission a chance to inflict a Toxin proc.

• Optimism gradually builds up Cold procs every few seconds, freezing the player solid for 3 seconds if 10 procs are allowed to accumulate. Rolling or Void Slinging will remove 3 stacks.

• Once ten duplicates of a given Peely Pix have been obtained, enough to upgrade it to Chromatic, any excess copies obtained via Peely Paks are automatically converted to 1 Pix Chip each.

summary: 贴纸芯片的当前版本资源身份与获取证据。
